name: Devious Path
short_description: You are trapped in an endless astral world. Keep a close eye on your surroundings to get out of the astral world.
detailed_description:
PLUG INTO THE ASTRAL WORLD


The player will visit the astral world which is full of horrors and nightmares, Keep a close eye on the changes in the otherworldly tunnel, don’t lose sight of any anomalies. Beware of any who wants to kill you, death in the astral means that these entities can take over your body, and they will wreak havoc and destruction when they enter our world. Under any circumstances we can’t let them escape. Be careful, the mistake might be unforgivable.

GAMEPLAY


▸ You have been given a location with two rooms and a common corridor
▸ Each room has its own history and inhabitants
▸ Keep a close eye on your surroundings, the changes are anomalies
▸ You must choose one of two doors to pass to the next level
▸ Move forward if you don’t see any anomalies
▸ Go back if you see an anomaly
▸ You need a key, which is hidden among the location, to open any of these doors
▸ One key - one level
▸ There are 13 levels, not counting (0) the training level (the instruction level)
▸ Death in the astral is a real threat
▸ Passage of the game based on the principle of searching for anomalies and keys

Play Time

60-120 minutes

supported_languages: English, Russian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Dutch, Polish, Japanese
